name: name
desc: example description

name: agnostic
desc: These weapons can be used against both A2A and A2G targets.

name: bulky
desc: Requires an extra Cap to use

name: Burst (Tiny)
desc: These weapons do splash damage to nearby enemies - or allies - in a tiny radius. May be given an additional modifier.

name: Burst (Small)
desc: These weapons do splash damage to nearby enemies - or allies - in a small radius. May be given an additional modifier.

name: Burst (Medium)
desc: These weapons do splash damage to nearby enemies - or allies - in a medium radius. May be given an additional modifier.

name: Burst (Large)
desc: These weapons do splash damage to nearby enemies - or allies - in a large area. May be given an additional modifier.

name: Burst (Huge)
desc: These weapons do splash damage to nearby enemies - or allies - in a huge area. May be given an additional modifier.

name: Burst (Colossal)
desc: These weapons do splash damage to nearby enemies - or allies - in a colossal area. May be given an additional modifier.

name: Burst (Calamitous)
desc: These weapons do splash damage to nearby enemies - or allies - in a truly disasterous area. May be given an additional modifier.

name: clunky
desc: Requires an extra energy to use

name: dangerous
desc: A dangerous weapon deals extra damage, either at a cost or at a risk to its user.

name: designate
desc: An ally with some form of Targeting Equipment may use Eyes Open to assist in employing these weapons.

name: dubious
desc: These weapons are shady and skirt modern laws of war. Use with caution, it may escalate the battle.

name: electroconcusive (both)
desc: When employed on an EWO plane, whenever you Jam, you may spend a Capacity to immediately use an extra Jam of either type without using a Maneuver slot. When employed on an non-EWO plane, grants access to both Jams.

name: electroconcusive (ally)
desc: When employed on an EWO plane, whenever Ally Jam is used, you may spend a Capacity to immediately use an extra Jam of that type without using a Maneuver slot. When employed on an non-EWO plane, grants access to Ally Jam.

name: electroconcusive (Enemy)
desc: When employed on an EWO plane, whenever Enemy Jam is used, you may spend a Capacity to immediately use an extra Jam of that type without using a Maneuver slot. When employed on an non-EWO plane, grants access Enemy Jam.

name: expensive
desc: Takes one extra turn to resupply (you may choose not to resupply this ordinance and lose usage.)

name: experimental
desc: Cutting edge technology. May come with strings attached.

name: flaming
desc: Starts fires. These spread; at the start of your turn, deal 1 damage to everything aflame.

name: guided
desc: You may choose to Fly Dangerously or Maneuver into Position after employing this Ordnance to upgrade a roll by one Step (up to a Full Success).

name: gun
desc: Remove the Gunless tag. If you don't have the Gunless tag already, gain +1 Forward whenever you don't employ Ordnance.

name: hypersonic
desc: These weapons move extremely fast. They may require Speed checks to avoid, or they hit before enemies can react.

name: imprecise
desc: Deployment may require Burning a Reaction or G-Resist or risking the munition(s) falling off course.

name: kinetic
desc: Kinetic weapons do not explode, burn, or have any special effects upon impact -- they just hit hard.

name: knife
desc: Only effective within extremely close range. If you have used Fly Dangerously or Maneuver into Position this turn, you Gain +2 Forward at close range but increase Consequences by a Step; suffer disadvantage otherwise.

name: light
desc: Lightweight weaponry. They cost -1 Energy to use but deal less damage.

name: loitering 2
desc: Makes attacks over 2 turns. Remind your AWACS.

name: manueverable
desc: You may Spend an Energy to gain +1 Forward on attacks with these weapons.

name: mission
desc: Some missions may require a specific Ordnance. The AWACS will explain when explaining the mission. Neglect to take these at your own risk

name: mini
desc: Ignore the first 2 Capacity expenditures when using these weapons.

name: multilock 4
desc: Multilock 4: Costs +1 Energy and Cap per 2 targets targetted to use, but hits 4 targets from the same die roll. They gain no benefits on a Perfect.

name: multilock 2
desc: Multilock 2: Costs +1 Energy and Cap per 2 targets targetted to use, but hits 2 targets from the same die roll. They gain no benefits on a Perfect.

name: penetrating (light)
desc: These weapons ignore the armor of lightly armored targets, like tanks, light bunkers, and so on.

name: penetrating (strong)
desc: These weapons ignore heavy armor, letting them penetrate targets like reinforced missile silos, underground bunkers, and battleships.

name: precise
desc: There is minimal to no risk of hitting the wrong target with these weapons.

name: ranged
desc: These weapons work at extremely long ranged. If you have used Maneuver Into Position or Reposition this turn, Hold a Mitigate Consequences; suffer Disadvantage otherwise.

name: recessed
desc: Gain +1 Speed and Manueverability if starting Capacity is less than 6.

name: ripple
desc: Ripple weapons fire in burst volleys. They don't suffer from any multiattack penalties when used.

name: sensitive
desc: Needs to be treated gently. Upon taking Survivability damage, you Face Mechanical Consequences.

name: simple
desc: Unaffected by things like enemy Jamming.

name: slowed
desc: Has some sort of mechanism to slow its deployment by one turn --- allowing an escape from the blast.

name: smokey
desc: Covers areas with thick smoke that obscures imaging and targeting equipment.

name: specific
desc: These weapons have Advantage against the specified targets and Disadvantage against all other targets.

name: specific (Aerial Radars & Jammers)
desc: These weapons have Advantage against AWACS and EWOS and Disadvantage against all other targets.

name: specific (Antiradiation)
desc: These weapons have Advantage against ground units with radars and jammers, Disadvantage against all other targets.

name: specific (Naval)
desc: These weapons have Advantage against naval targets and Disadvantage against all other targets.

name: specific (Satellite)
desc: These weapons have Advantage against targets that breach the Karman Line and Disadvantage against all other targets.

name: strategic
desc: These weapons may not have immediate effect when used, and are better used before contact with the enemy.

name: Weak
desc: Deals 1 less damage
